title: Leaving South Africa
excerpt: Took this while taking off from Cape Town. It was a short flight to Johannesburg and I am just about to board the long flight to ATL. It will allow plenty of time for reflection on this amazing (and life…
body: Took this while taking off from Cape Town. It was a short flight to Johannesburg and I am just about to board the long flight to ATL. It will allow plenty of time for reflection on this amazing (and life changing) trip, and hopefully enough rest to get back into the swing of things when I arrive late morning on Monday. Hope you all had a great weekend, wherever you are in the world!
